---
name: Feature request
about: Something pg-flux doesn't do that you wish it did.
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
---

> Before filing: please check the [ROADMAP](../../ROADMAP.md) — your idea might already be planned, or might be explicitly out of scope.

## The problem

What real workflow are you stuck on? Be concrete. "I want X" is less useful than "I'm trying to do Y and pg-flux makes me do Z".

## Proposed solution

What you think pg-flux should do. Specifics help: CLI flag name, config key, command syntax.

## Alternatives you've considered

What other tools or workarounds you've tried, and why they didn't fit.

## Scope considerations

- Does this need a new CLI flag? A new config key? A new command?
- Would it change behavior for existing users? If so, can it be behind an opt-in?
- Is this PG version-specific? Which versions does it apply to?

## Willingness to contribute

Are you up for opening the PR? (No pressure — just useful to know.)
